Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\Dell\\Downloads\\e-scrap\\E-scrapper\\classifieds_Kallakurichi_14-03-2026 \(8\).json', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

print\('Top-level keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
print\('edition:', data.get\('edition'\)\)
print\('date:', data.get\('date'\)\)
print\('total_classified_pages:', data.get\('total_classified_pages'\)\)
print\('_debug keys:', list\(data.get\('_debug', {}\).keys\(\)\)\)
print\(\)

pages = data.get\('classified_pages', []\)
print\(f'classified_pages count: {len\(pages\)}'\)
for i, pg in enumerate\(pages\):
    print\(f'--- Page {i} ---'\)
    print\('  page_label:', pg.get\('page_label'\)\)
    print\('  page_no:', pg.get\('page_no'\)\)
    print\('  story_ids:', pg.get\('story_ids'\)\)
    print\('  pic_ids:', pg.get\('pic_ids'\)\)
    print\('  content_blocks count:', len\(pg.get\('content_blocks', []\)\)\)
    print\('  ad_images count:', len\(pg.get\('ad_images', []\)\)\)
    print\('  page_image_b64 present:', bool\(pg.get\('page_image_b64'\)\)\)
    
    ad_imgs = pg.get\('ad_images', []\)
    for j, ad in enumerate\(ad_imgs[:5]\):
        print\(f'    ad[{j}] pic_id={ad.get\(\\"pic_id\\"\)} org_id={ad.get\(\\"org_id\\"\)} caption={ad.get\(\\"caption\\"\)!r} has_image={bool\(ad.get\(\\"image_b64\\"\)\)}'\)
    if len\(ad_imgs\) > 5:
        print\(f'    ... and {len\(ad_imgs\)-5} more'\)
    
    rects = pg.get\('_debug_rects', []\)
    print\(f'  _debug_rects count: {len\(rects\)}'\)
    for r in rects[:10]:
        print\(f'    rect: {r}'\)
    if len\(rects\) > 10:
        print\(f'    ... and {len\(rects\)-10} more'\)
")

Bash(/c/Users/Dell/Downloads/E-scrapper/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import asyncio
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def test\(\):
    async with async_playwright\(\) as pw:
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch\(\)
        page = await browser.new_page\(\)
        await page.set_content\('<html><body>test</body></html>'\)
        pdf = await page.pdf\(format='A4', margin={'top':'0px','bottom':'0px','left':'0px','right':'0px'}, print_background=True\)
        await browser.close\(\)
        print\('OK', len\(pdf\)\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
